raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 2
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work and articulates the delta, but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (unverified Google production claim).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.6,
    "RX.5": 0.5
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work and articulates the delta, but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (unverified Google production claim).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
